creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note: Changing to USES:3.x+ (as in attachment 184868) will break package creation without the creation of py3-* ports for its dependencies, at least until the official package build infrastructure is updated (to use a special poudriere version, cc bdrewery@).

I would hold off on this update, and backport only commits from upstream that fix the issue in bug 220470 if they exist.
